summary: Comprehensive testing of NeuCarS (renamed from NeuroVoltage) Cardiac Electrophysiology Analysis Platform - Iteration 4. All requested features verified working. Fixed a bug with pulse modification not showing 'Modified' badge and 'Apply Changes' button.
passed_tests: ✅ Backend /api/ returns 'NeuCarS API' message (renamed from NeuroVoltage)
✅ Drug configuration checkboxes: Propranolol, Nepicastat, Tetrodotoxin, Acetylcholine, Isoproterenol, Other
✅ Drug concentration inputs appear when drug is selected (e.g., Propranolol shows 5µM)
✅ Perfusion start and time inputs appear when drugs are selected
✅ Default readouts badge shows drug-specific readout times (e.g., 'Propranolol: BF@12min, HRV@10min')
✅ Analysis panel has separate HRV and BF readout minute inputs with checkboxes
✅ Analysis panel has 'Baseline Settings' section with HRV (0-3min) and BF (1-2min) configurable
✅ Light panel title changed to 'Light Induced HRA (Heart Rate Adaptation) - using BPM'
✅ Light panel BF chart X-axis uses min:sec format (0min1s, 0min2s, etc.)
✅ Light panel pulse selection can be modified with left/right arrows
✅ Light panel shows 'Modified' badge when pulses are changed
✅ Light panel shows 'Apply Changes & Recompute' button when pulses are modified
✅ Light panel shows 'Reset' button when pulses are modified

fixed_issues.issue: Pulse modification did not show 'Modified' badge and 'Apply Changes' button because onPulsesUpdate was called immediately, updating parent state to match local state
fixed_issues.fix: Removed immediate onPulsesUpdate call in handleAdjustPulse - now only updates local state until user clicks 'Apply Changes'

seed_data_creation: Used pyabf sample file (171116sh_0012.abf) from GitHub for UI testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from iteration 4 are working: App renamed to NeuCarS, Light Response renamed to Light Induced HRA, Drug configuration with 5 predefined drugs + Other option, Pulse selection modification with left/right arrows now properly shows Modified badge and Apply Changes button, X-axis in Light panel uses min:sec format, Analysis panel has separate HRV and BF readout controls with baseline settings.

features_verified.app_rename: Working - NeuCarS title in header and upload page
features_verified.drug_configuration: Working - 6 drug options with checkboxes, concentrations, perfusion timing
features_verified.light_induced_hra: Working - Renamed from Light Response Metrics
features_verified.pulse_modification: Working - Left/right arrows adjust pulse timing, Modified badge, Apply Changes button
features_verified.separate_readout_controls: Working - HRV and BF readout checkboxes with minute inputs in Analysis panel
features_verified.baseline_settings: Working - Configurable HRV (0-3min) and BF (1-2min) baseline ranges
